entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being studied for grain hardness.

entities.name: GRAIN HARDNESS
entities.description: The physical property of sorghum grains being tested.

entities.name: DENSITY GRADING IN SODIUM NITRATE SOLUTION
entities.description: An indirect, non-destructive method for testing grain hardness using a specific solution density.

entities.name: SODIUM NITRATE SOLUTION
entities.description: The chemical solution used as the medium for density grading.

entities.name: PERCENTAGE OF FLOATING KERNELS
entities.description: The measurement obtained from the density grading method.

entities.name: PERCENTAGE VITREOUSNESS
entities.description: A measure of the glassy appearance of the grain, correlated with floating kernels.

entities.name: WORK REQUIRED FOR GRINDING
entities.description: A measure of grain hardness based on the energy needed for grinding.

entities.name: FLOUR PARTICLE SIZE
entities.description: The size of particles in the flour produced from the grain.

entities.name: RHEOLOGICAL PROPERTIES OF SORGHUM FLOUR DOUGH
entities.description: The flow and deformation properties of the dough made from sorghum flour.
